title: God stick
description: The God Stick is a data pack that hands you total invincibility for the low, low price of eight sticks and a diamond. It's a blatant power trip that lets you survive lava, creepers, and terminal velocity without breaking a sweat.
body:
# ⚡ The God Stick: Absolute Power in the Palm of Your Hand! ⚡
Tired of creepers blowing up your masterpiece? Sick of taking random fall damage or running from hordes of zombies in the dead of night? **What if you could become completely untouchable with just one item?** Welcome to the ultimate power fantasy. Say hello to the **God Stick**.
### 🌟 What Does It Do?
It's simple: **Hold the stick. Become a God.** The moment you equip the God Stick in your hand, you are granted epic, game-breaking God Mode. No commands, no cheats enabled required—just pure, unadulterated invincibility built right into a simple Data Pack.

![Yu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2062030f9de1faa358f3e49be5c659a91268fa0b.png)

### 🛠️ How to Craft Your Power
You don't need a Nether Star or an Elytra to achieve immortality. You just need a little bit of wealth and some wood.
**The Recipe:**
 * **Center Slot:** 1x Diamond 💎
 * **Surrounding Slots:** 8x Sticks 🪵
 * **Result:** 1x God Stick 🔥

![Dd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04ba5eb92029a0f1a44cc131773bfcc64cd4fb5e.png)

### 🎮 The "God Mode" Challenge: What Will You Do First?
Once you craft the God Stick, the Minecraft world is your playground. We challenge you to try these out and let us know in the comments if you survived:
 * [ ] **The Lava Bath:** Take a casual swim in the deepest Nether lava lakes.
 * [ ] **The Creeper Hug:** Find a supercharged creeper and give it a big, explosive hug.
 * [ ] **The Warden Whisperer:** Walk right into the Deep Dark and trigger a Warden... then just stand there.
 * [ ] **The Skyfall:** Jump off the highest peak in the new 1.21 mountains without a water bucket.
### ⚙️ Technical Details & Compatibility
 * **Versions:** Fully compatible with Java Edition **1.16.x all the way up to 1.21+**!
 * **Type:** Data Pack (Lightweight and easy to install).
 * **Multiplayer:** Perfect for trolling your friends on a private server!
**👇 Ready to become invincible? Hit that download button and claim your God Stick today! 👇**

------MADE BY ERROR6119-------
